name: localized_color_focus
description: Highlights compact, visually distinct candidate object regions and adds zoomed crops to support later color inspection of a referenced item.
applicability_conditions: Use when a direct visual-attribute question asks for the color of a specific named object or object part, and the object must first be localized within a full scene or an upstream artifact. Appropriate for multiple-choice direct lookup cases where a single item needs local inspection, including small carried items, clothing parts, accessories, or other compact foreground/background objects, but not for counting or relation-heavy tasks.
